# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- First general instruction
- Second general instruction
- Use PowerShell for commands in the terminal (preferred shell: powershell.exe).

## CI/CD Configuration
- CI/CD should build and test all projects/libraries in the solution.
- Deploy the App.API container to AKS using the image name 'MultiPurposeApp'.
- Apply pipelines and Kubernetes manifests for the whole solution.
